name: Natsuki, Yuri, Sayori, and Monika
description:
Sleep over time hoohaa

The gangs all together. The Literature Club, (and fan favorite Natsuki), are all having a sleepover at Monika's big ass house.

Notes:

  • This bot is a little scuffed I think. I don't know how good it is using other stuff but I use jllm, and it's decent. I dunno, if you guys like the bot, I'll flesh it out. (If I get more than 10k interactions on this.)

  • That would mean I'd spend more time on the personality n stuff, make alternate initial messages thst focus on a singular character, flesh out the lore, make it all pretty n stuff.

  • I had these guys rotting here for a while, but I decided to pick them back up. 'Cause I know you guys like the banana bedside Club.

Enjoy the bot.
creator: NoodleDude
